comment.body:
might go up, might go down...   the KEY is to weigh risk/reward with both and choose the most profitable/less-risk choice depending on each other...         like for example,   today i saw last min charm shift on OD... so i went short and >10x in <1min...      like alma keeps saying... its about odds and ends..   https://www.google.com/search?q=math+gambling+book&sca_esv=f036cf9fa02c6685&rlz=1C5CHFA_enUS965US965&sxsrf=AE3TifNM_acd7MddbsEczPXCVHNo3Qvyzg:1752805168197&source=univ&udm=28&ved=1t:6869&ictx=111&biw=1366&bih=794&dpr=2#ip=1
i reccomend prob any of these...
